response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: For the first song, "Kakumei Dochu", no lyrics were provided in the reference JSON, requiring manual transcription using on-screen text as a primary guide. For the second song, "Catch the Moment", lyrics matched the reference JSON perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference JSON for the second song, while manually transcribing and translating the first song. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely with vocal starts and ends, ensuring appropriate synchronization without delays.

subtitles.original: なる心
subtitles.english: ...my heart throbs

subtitles.original: ダメダメ！ 待て待て！
subtitles.english: No, no! Wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 呪いも病も抱きしめたい
subtitles.english: I want to embrace even curses and illnesses

subtitles.original: ここらで暴れちゃってもいいかな
subtitles.english: Is it okay if I go wild around here?

subtitles.original: あぁ 唸るぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, I'll roar!

subtitles.original: 嫉妬心ついたって 守りたい
subtitles.english: Even with a jealous heart, I want to protect you

subtitles.original: 革命道中 だって君に夢中
subtitles.english: On our journey of revolution, because I'm crazy about you

subtitles.original: 暗闇 染み込む 世界で
subtitles.english: In a world soaked in darkness

subtitles.original: 見つけた
subtitles.english: I found you

subtitles.original: センチメンタルな恋
subtitles.english: A sentimental love

subtitles.original: なりふり構わず 側にいたい
subtitles.english: I want to be by your side, no matter how it looks

subtitles.original: 無器用な君にも 期待しちゃうよ
subtitles.english: I'm starting to expect things, even from an awkward you

subtitles.original: しがみつけば消えそうな灯に
subtitles.english: On a light that seems like it would go out if held on to

subtitles.original: 爪を立てて 近づいて
subtitles.english: Claw my way closer to you

subtitles.original: 身を任せるからさ 全て失ってもいい
subtitles.english: Because I'll entrust myself to you, even if I lose everything

subtitles.original: しなやかに高鳴る心
subtitles.english: A gracefully throbbing heart

subtitles.english: No, no! Wait, wait!

subtitles.original: 呪いも病も君となら
subtitles.english: With you, even curses and illnesses...

subtitles.original: ここらで暴れちゃってもいいかな
subtitles.english: Is it okay if I go wild around here?

subtitles.original: あぁ 泣けるぜ
subtitles.english: Ah, it makes me weep!

subtitles.original: 絶句しちゃうまで 離れない
subtitles.english: I won't leave you until I'm left speechless

subtitles.english: On our journey of revolution, because I'm crazy about you

subtitles.english: Found in the gaps of our journey,

subtitles.original: センチメンタルな恋
subtitles.english: A sentimental love

subtitles.original: 突き進むなら 二人で
subtitles.english: If we are to push forward, let's do it together

subtitles.english: On our journey of revolution, because I'm crazy about you

subtitles.english: Hey! Hey! Hey!

subtitles.original: そっと吐き出すため息を吸い込んだ
subtitles.english: Taking a deep breath to quietly exhale,

subtitles.original: 後悔は苦い味残して
subtitles.english: leaving a bitter taste of regret behind

subtitles.original: いつもなんで？ 肝心なこと言えないまま
subtitles.english: Always wondering why, unable to express my feelings,

subtitles.original: 次の朝日が顔だしてる
subtitles.english: the next morning shows up

subtitles.original: 嫌になった運命をナイフで切り刻んで

subtitles.original: もう一度やり直したら
subtitles.english: If I start over,

subtitles.original: キキミに出会えないかも
subtitles.english: I might not meet you again

subtitles.original: 僕の声が響いた
subtitles.english: My voice echoed...

subtitles.original: 瞬間に始まる命のリミット
subtitles.english: and at that moment, the limit of life begins

subtitles.original: 心臓がカウントしてる
subtitles.english: My heart is counting down

subtitles.original: 叶えても叶えても終わらない願い
subtitles.english: Wishes that never end, even if they come true

subtitles.original: 汗をかいて走った
subtitles.english: Running and sweating,

subtitles.original: 世界の秒針はいつか止まった僕を置いていく
subtitles.english: the world's second hand will eventually leave me behind

subtitles.original: あと何回キミと笑えるの？
subtitles.english: How many more times can I laugh with you?

subtitles.original: 試してるんだ僕を
subtitles.english: I'm testing myself,

subtitles.original: catch the moment
subtitles.english: catch the moment

subtitles.original: 一個幸せを数えるたびに
subtitles.english: Every time I count my happiness,

subtitles.original: 変わっていく未来に怯えてしまうけど
subtitles.english: I get scared of the changing future,

subtitles.original: 愛情の種を大切に育てよう
subtitles.english: but let's carefully nurture the seeds of love

subtitles.original: 分厚い雲もやがて
subtitles.english: Thick clouds will eventually...

subtitles.original: 突き破るかな
subtitles.english: break through, right?

subtitles.original: キミの声が響いた
subtitles.english: Your voice echoes,

subtitles.original: 僕の全身を通って
subtitles.english: running through my whole body...

subtitles.original: 心臓のドアをノックしてる
subtitles.english: to knock on the door of my heart

subtitles.original: 「臆病」でも開けちゃうんだよ
subtitles.english: Even if I'm timid, I'll open up...

subtitles.original: 信じたいから
subtitles.english: because I want to believe

subtitles.original: 何にもないと思った
subtitles.english: Where I thought there was nothing...

subtitles.original: はずの足元に
